_comment: The model registry — generalized from roleos-admin/config/models.json. Each JOB names a provider + model + params, so swapping a model is config, not code. callModel(job, input) resolves here and writes an agent_runs row. NOTE: Opus 4.8 / Sonnet 4.6 REMOVED temperature/top_p/top_k (they 400) and budget_tokens — steer with `effort` + adaptive thinking instead. Costs are USD per 1M tokens (quality-first budget, but every call is metered).

reason.description: High-stakes reasoning: matching, the mirror, negotiation, adversarial grading.

draft.description: Drafting: resume, cover, screening answers, recruiter replies.

quick_tag.description: Cheap, fast classification: recruiter-message labels, light tags. Haiku 4.5 — no effort param (it 400s on Haiku); plain call.

critic.description: The quality-gate LLM-judge — a SEPARATE call grading drafts vs the ro-voice ship-checklist. Uses the reasoning tier so the judge is at least as strong as the drafter.

embed.description: Embeddings for semantic role matching. Cloudflare Workers AI bge — EVERYWHERE (dev + prod), no Ollama. One model, one vector space.
